svg.aria-label: SM_120 Pipeline Architecture: SMSP internal datapath from warp scheduler through execution pipes to writeback
svg.text: SM_120 Pipeline Architecture · Per-SMSP Internal Datapath
GB202 Blackwell · Single-issue · CGGTY scheduler · 6 independent pipe backends · 2-bank RF with RFC ≥24 entries
Source: S1/case_2, S1/case_4, S3/case_9, S11/case_128-156, S12/case_1-6, S13/case_12, S22/case_1-56
SM (1 of 110) · 4 identical SMSPs · 48 warps total · 256 KB RF · 100 KB SRAM · aggregate IPC ceiling: 4.0 (measured 3.66)

g.text: LDG STG LDS STS LDSM STSM
Compiler trust model — wrong stall → SILENT corruption
stall replaces (not adds to) dependency wait
Consumer: WaitBarrier[6b] → "gate issue on SB bitmask"
L2-forced cliff: N=10-11→12 (via SB counter sharing)
FMA + LSU · FMA + FP64 · FMA + TMA · FMA + Uniform
XU + LSU · XU + Tensor · FP64 + LSU · ALU + SMEM
SFU + SMEM · Tensor + DSMEM · HMMA + IMMA (sub-pipe)
FMA + Tensor: 2.4% (near-full, FFMA fills MMA stall)
FMA + TEX: 10% (TEX addr calc borrows FMA sub-pipe)
29-cyc MMA window → up to 27 non-MMA insns FREE
N≤12: all overlap (issue cost only) · N=14: 492× stall cliff
L1 data cache: 44 cyc (89 KB effective, pattern-invariant)
L2 unified: 354 cyc (96 MB, 12 partitions, XOR hash)
SM_120 · GB202 · RTX PRO 5000 72 GB · CUDA 13.3 · 2572 MHz locked
